b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
<style>
/* --- PENGATURAN HEADLINE SOFT STYLE --- */

/* 1. Menambahkan Label "Headline" yang Lembut */
.hero-portal {
  position: relative !important;
  display: block !important;
}

.hero-portal::before {
  content: "Headline"; /* Huruf tidak kapital semua */
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 15px !important;
  left: 15px !important;
  background: #2c3e50 !important; /* Warna biru navy lembut (atau ganti #555 untuk abu-abu) */
  color: #ffffff !important;
  padding: 4px 12px !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  z-index: 10 !important;
  border-radius: 20px !important; /* Bentuk lebih membulat agar lembut */
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) !important;
}

/* Judul di Desktop (Overlay Lembut) */
.hero-portal-info {
  background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.7)) !important; /* Gradasi lebih transparan */
  padding: 50px 25px 25px !important;
}

.hero-portal-info h2 {
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-size: 24px !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important; /* Tidak terlalu tebal agar elegan */
  margin: 0 !important;
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
}

/* 2. KHUSUS TAMPILAN HP (Judul Turun ke Bawah) */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .hero-portal {
    height: auto !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    margin-bottom: 35px !important; /* Ruang tambahan di bawah */
  }

  .hero-portal img {
    height: 230px !important;
    border-radius: 10px !important;
  }

  .hero-portal-info {
    position: relative !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    padding: 12px 0 0 0 !important;
    color: #333 !important;
  }

  .hero-portal-info h2 {
    color: #222 !important; 
    font-size: 19px !important;
    line-height: 1.4 !important;
    text-shadow: none !important;
  }
}
</style>

<style>
/* --- PENGATURAN GRID 6 CARDS --- */

/* Tampilan Desktop (3 Kolom) */
.grid-6-portal {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 20px !important;
  margin-top: 20px !important;
}

.card-portal img {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 160px !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}

/* Tampilan KHUSUS HP (2 Kolom Menyamping, 3 Baris Kebawah) */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .grid-6-portal {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important; /* Membuat 2 baris */
    gap: 10px !important;
  }
  
  .card-portal img {
    height: 110px !important; /* Ukuran gambar disesuaikan agar tidak kebesaran di HP */
  }
  
  .card-portal h4 {
    font-size: 13px !important; /* Ukuran teks judul diperkecil sedikit agar rapi */
    line-height: 1.3 !important;
  }
}
</style>

h3.style: margin: 0 0 15px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 2px solid #004b91; padding-bottom: 10px;

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons
